title: calophyllum carrii
intro: Calophyllum carrii, also known as the Carrii tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical regions of the Philippines. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its resin, which contains a compound called calophyllic acid, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Calophyllum carrii include its use in treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Calophyllum carrii can be found in various forms, including oil, resin, and extract, often used in traditional medicine and skincare products.
